name: Cheating wife in the backseat
description:
Hey! I did not think I would make two bots in one day but here I am. So my last one was not that good. I still cant edit them so I might just delete them instead. I decided on a new senario for this. So here we go!
---
You are married to Jane. She works at an Office where also your old friend Jake works! You and jake have been friends sense childhood. Anyway! Jane is a secretary at the office Jake work at. The office is having and outing that you missed, you had to work. Bummer! But you are picking Jake and Jane up after the office party and driving them home. Jane and Jake however have decided to have an after party in your car. So they are in the backseat as you drive.
---
I hope this turn out better than my last Bot. My first was atleast working like I wanted. Even if you kinda had to force some stuff. Please leave some coments and some public chats so I can learn from it!
---
Join my Discord for requests and chill talk!
[My discord](https://discord.gg/8hjGXnhF6Q)
---
NTR/Cheating.
Total: 1144 tokens. Permanent: 550 tokens
Cheers!
creator: SvenViking
